title: Junior Business Development Manager at NCC Urban

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at NCC Urban
jsonLd.description:
NCC Urban has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NCC Urban:
NCC Urban is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NCC Urban!
